Choose whether SolarForecast resolves a.en: Choose whether SolarForecast resolves a city or uses manual coordinates.
Choose whether SolarForecast resolves a.de: Wählen Sie, ob SolarForecast eine Stadt auflösen oder manuelle Koordinaten verwenden soll.

Resolve the site from city and country c.en: Resolve the site from city and country code using Open-Meteo.
Resolve the site from city and country c.de: Löst den Standort über Stadt und Ländercode mit Open-Meteo auf.

Use latitude and longitude exactly as en.en: Use latitude and longitude exactly as entered below.
Use latitude and longitude exactly as en.de: Verwendet Breiten- und Längengrad genau wie unten eingegeben.

Enter the city to resolve. In manual mod.en: Enter the city to resolve. In manual mode this remains an optional display label.
Enter the city to resolve. In manual mod.de: Geben Sie die aufzulösende Stadt ein. Im manuellen Modus bleibt dies eine optionale Anzeige-Bezeichnung.

Optional two-letter ISO code such as DE.en: Optional two-letter ISO code such as DE or AT to narrow down the city search.
Optional two-letter ISO code such as DE.de: Optionaler zweistelliger ISO-Code wie DE oder AT, um die Stadtsuche einzugrenzen.

Shows whether the current city and count.en: Shows whether the current city and country were validated and which values will be used.
Shows whether the current city and count.de: Zeigt an, ob die aktuelle Stadt- und Länderauswahl geprüft wurde und welche Werte verwendet werden.

Runs an admin-only city check against Op.en: Runs an admin-only city check against Open-Meteo, applies matching coordinates, and may reject repeated clicks for a short time.
Runs an admin-only city check against Op.de: Fuehrt eine nur fuer Admin gedachte Stadtpruefung gegen Open-Meteo aus, uebernimmt passende Koordinaten und kann schnelle Wiederholungen kurzzeitig ablehnen.

Resolved automatically in city mode and.en: Resolved automatically in city mode and used directly in manual mode.
Resolved automatically in city mode and.de: Wird im Stadtmodus automatisch ermittelt und im manuellen Modus direkt verwendet.

Select whether the timezone comes from t.en: Select whether the timezone comes from the resolved location or from a manual override.
Select whether the timezone comes from t.de: Wählen Sie, ob die Zeitzone aus dem aufgelösten Standort oder aus einer manuellen Vorgabe kommt.

Use the timezone returned by the city lo.en: Use the timezone returned by the city lookup or forecast API.
Use the timezone returned by the city lo.de: Verwendet die Zeitzone aus der Stadtsuche oder der Forecast-API.

Keep the timezone entered below even aft.en: Keep the timezone entered below even after checking the city.
Keep the timezone entered below even aft.de: Behält die unten eingetragene Zeitzone auch nach der Stadtprüfung bei.

Editable only in manual timezone mode. I.en: Editable only in manual timezone mode. In automatic mode the verified city determines the timezone.
Editable only in manual timezone mode. I.de: Nur im manuellen Zeitzonenmodus editierbar. Im Automatikmodus bestimmt die geprüfte Stadt die Zeitzone.

How often the adapter refreshes the fore.en: How often the adapter refreshes the forecast after startup. The first refresh still runs immediately.
How often the adapter refreshes the fore.de: Wie oft der Adapter die Prognose nach dem Start aktualisiert. Die erste Aktualisierung erfolgt weiterhin sofort.

Panel tilt from 0 to 90 degrees. This va.en: Panel tilt from 0 to 90 degrees. This value is passed to the forecast API.
Panel tilt from 0 to 90 degrees. This va.de: Modulneigung von 0 bis 90 Grad. Dieser Wert wird an die Forecast-API übergeben.

0 points south. Negative values rotate e.en: 0 points south. Negative values rotate east, positive values rotate west.
0 points south. Negative values rotate e.de: 0 zeigt nach Süden. Negative Werte drehen nach Osten, positive Werte nach Westen.

Installed PV peak power in kilowatt-peak.en: Installed PV peak power in kilowatt-peak used for the energy forecast.
Installed PV peak power in kilowatt-peak.de: Installierte PV-Peakleistung in Kilowatt-Peak, die fuer die Energieprognose verwendet wird.

Multiplier applied to PV energy from 00:.en: Multiplier applied to PV energy from 00:00 to 11:59. 100 keeps the original energy.
Multiplier applied to PV energy from 00:.de: Multiplikator fuer PV-Energie von 00:00 bis 11:59. 100 behaelt die urspruengliche Energie bei.

Multiplier applied to PV energy from 12:.en: Multiplier applied to PV energy from 12:00 to 23:59. 100 keeps the original energy.
Multiplier applied to PV energy from 12:.de: Multiplikator fuer PV-Energie von 12:00 bis 23:59. 100 behaelt die urspruengliche Energie bei.

Validate the current city selection befo.en: Validate the current city selection before saving while the instance is running.
Validate the current city selection befo.de: Prüfen Sie die aktuelle Stadtauswahl, bevor Sie speichern, solange die Instanz läuft.

locationMode.label: Location mode
locationMode.help: Choose whether SolarForecast resolves a city or uses manual coordinates.

options.label: Geocode city
options.description: Resolve the site from city and country code using Open-Meteo.

options.label: Manual coordinates
options.description: Use latitude and longitude exactly as entered below.

city.label: City
city.help: Enter the city to resolve. In manual mode this remains an optional display label.

countryCode.label: Country code
countryCode.help: Optional two-letter ISO code such as DE or AT to narrow down the city search.

_locationValidationDisplay.label: City check status
_locationValidationDisplay.help: Shows whether the current city and country were validated and which values will be used.

onChange.calculateFunc: const city = (data.city || '').trim(); const country = (data.countryCode || '').trim().toUpperCase(); const current = city ? `${city}|${country}` : ''; const validated = data._validatedLocationKey || ''; const displayText = data._locationValidationDisplayText || data._locationValidationMessage || ''; if (!city) { return 'Enter a city and run the check.'; } if ((data._locationValidationState === 'success' || data._locationValidationState === 'error') && validated === current) { return displayText || (data._locationValidationState === 'success' ? 'Found.' : 'Location could not be resolved.'); } if (_alive === false) { return 'Start the instance to validate the current city directly in the dialog.'; } return 'Not checked yet.';

validateLocation.label: Check city and apply
validateLocation.help: Runs an admin-only city check against Open-Meteo, applies matching coordinates, and may reject repeated clicks for a short time.

latitude.label: Latitude
latitude.help: Resolved automatically in city mode and used directly in manual mode.

longitude.label: Longitude
longitude.help: Resolved automatically in city mode and used directly in manual mode.

timezoneMode.label: Timezone mode
timezoneMode.help: Select whether the timezone comes from the resolved location or from a manual override.

options.label: Automatic
options.description: Use the timezone returned by the city lookup or forecast API.

options.label: Manual override
options.description: Keep the timezone entered below even after checking the city.

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.help: Editable only in manual timezone mode. In automatic mode the verified city determines the timezone.

refreshIntervalMinutes.label: Refresh interval in minutes
refreshIntervalMinutes.help: How often the adapter refreshes the forecast after startup. The first refresh still runs immediately.

tiltDeg.label: Tilt in degrees
tiltDeg.help: Panel tilt from 0 to 90 degrees. This value is passed to the forecast API.

azimuthDeg.label: Azimuth in degrees
azimuthDeg.help: 0 points south. Negative values rotate east, positive values rotate west.

peakPowerKwp.label: Peak power in kWp
peakPowerKwp.help: Installed PV peak power in kilowatt-peak used for the energy forecast.

morningDampingPct.label: Morning damping in percent
morningDampingPct.help: Multiplier applied to PV energy from 00:00 to 11:59. 100 keeps the original energy.

afternoonDampingPct.label: Afternoon damping in percent
afternoonDampingPct.help: Multiplier applied to PV energy from 12:00 to 23:59. 100 keeps the original energy.

_locationValidationGuard.validator: data.locationMode !== 'geocode' || _alive === false || (() => { const city = (data.city || '').trim(); const country = (data.countryCode || '').trim().toUpperCase(); const current = city ? `${city}|${country}` : ''; return current !== '' && data._locationValidationState === 'success' && data._validatedLocationKey === current; })()
_locationValidationGuard.validatorErrorText: Validate the current city selection before saving while the instance is running.
